title: aglaia cucullata
intro: Aglaia cucullata, also known as the Ceylon cheese tree or the Indian cheese tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The extracts from this plant have been found to exhibit potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating infections. Aglaia cucullata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
